name: LocalSecurityDecryptAES128ECB
title: LocalSecurityDecryptAES128ECB
syntax: long LocalSecurityDecryptAES128ECB(BYTE[] key, dword keyLength, BYTE[] cipheredData, dword cipheredData Length, BYTE[] plainData, dword plainData Length)
description: Decrypts data with a given key and initialization vector. The decryption is AES128 (ECB), PKCS5 Padding.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key to be used for AES (128 bit)
